description: 共享父池与轻规则池的 screening 规范。用于后续构建专门子池时统一 LLM 语义筛选标准，不直接触发任何实际构池任务。

human_full_body_realistic.screening_goal: 保留至少一个可读主人物的人体场景，优先自然人体呈现，并让身体、肢体或头身比例线索足够清楚，供 body_proportion_error 和 extra_limbs 复用。
llm_prompt_focus: at least one readable main human subject
natural human presentation is preferred, but stylization is allowed if body readability remains clear
body, limbs, or head-to-body relation should be readable enough for later anatomical degradation
multi-person scenes are allowed when one main subject remains clearly readable
exclude non-human or heavily transformed humanoids, mannequin-like subjects, and explicit adult-pose prompts

structured_object_primary.screening_goal: 保留有单个主导性结构化非生物物体的 prompt，确保轮廓、部件和材质观感可读。
llm_prompt_focus: shape, parts, and surface material are easy to perceive
exclude biology-dominant or overly crowded scenes

multi_object_reference.screening_goal: 先做轻量规则预筛，再保留多个可读实体、或一个主体加清楚参照关系的 prompt；实体可以是物体、人或动物。
llm_prompt_focus: entities may be objects, humans, or animals
at least two readable entities, or one main subject with a clear reference context
object boundaries or object relations are readable
do not require highly explicit geometric language

dimension_focus: at least one main human subject
head-to-body ratio and leg length must be readable for that main subject
non-human or strongly transformed humanoids should be rejected
at least one main human subject
arms or limbs should be readable enough for later extra-limb degradation
criteria should be slightly looser than body_proportion_error
structured non-living object should dominate the scene
shape and part layout must be easy to read
surface material cues must be readable
object category should remain visually obvious
there should be at least one clear reference object for later scale comparison
object boundaries and contact relations should be readable
criteria should stay broad enough to preserve prompt volume
subject may be an object, a human, or an animal
